_migration_v5_to_v6.description: Auto-upgrade from v5: add frontendType='none' to project and each relatedProject, add frontendIndicators={detected:[],source:'none'}, add logFile=null to each service, add e2eUrl=null and browserPreference='agent-browser' to testing, add chromeDevtools=false to capabilities.frontendTesting, remove any liveE2eEligibility or credentialType fields, bump version to 6.

relatedProjects.name: project-name
relatedProjects.relationship: webapp | mobile | api | worker | shared-lib | docs
relatedProjects.logCommand: docker logs -f container-name | command to view logs for this related project | null

database.connectionCommand: docker compose exec mongodb mongosh dbname
database.seedStrategy: autonomous | command — autonomous (recommended): agents create test data per suite via API/DB; command: run seedCommand globally
database.seedCommand: docker compose exec backend python manage.py seed_test_data | null
database.migrationCommand: docker compose exec backend python manage.py migrate | null
database.cleanupCommand: docker compose exec mongodb mongosh dbname --eval 'db.dropDatabase()' | null

externalServices.name: service-name
externalServices.type: payment | storage | email | queue | cache | api | cloud
externalServices.sandboxCheck: command to verify sandbox mode | null
externalServices.webhookListener: command to forward webhooks to local endpoint | null

testing.unitTestCommand: docker compose exec backend python -m pytest -x -q

testCredentials.role-name: MUST be an env var name like $TEST_USER_PASSWORD — raw secret values are forbidden and will be redacted
